prompt:

Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite

Style/medium: moody post-apocalyptic tactics sprite illustration, painterly pixel-art-inspired, readable at small scale
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, grounded combat-ready stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
